# OneRoster API

> Generated from: https://api.alpha-1edtech.com/oneroster/openapi.yaml
> Generated on: 2025-09-18T03:08:11.085Z

---

# OneRoster API

- **OpenAPI Version:** `3.1.0`
- **API Version:** `1.0.0`

# Authentication

All endpoints require authentication using the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

The token can be obtained with:

```curl
curl -X POST https://alpha-auth-production-idp.auth.us-west-2.amazoncognito.com/oauth2/token \
-H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
-d "grant_type=client_credentials&client_id=<your-client-id>&client_secret=<your-client-secret>"
```

Use the correct IDP server depending on the environment you're using:

- Production Server: <https://alpha-auth-production-idp.auth.us-west-2.amazoncognito.com>
- Staging Server: <https://alpha-auth-development-idp.auth.us-west-2.amazoncognito.com>

Reach out to the platform team to get a client/secret pair for your application.

# Pagination

Our API uses offset pagination for list endpoints. Paginated responses include the following fields:

- `offset`: Offset for the next page of results
- `limit`: Number of items per page (default: 100, maximum: 3000)

**Note:** While the OneRoster specification does not define a maximum limit, this implementation enforces a maximum of 3000 items per page to prevent abuse and ensure optimal performance.

Example request:

```bash
GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users?offset=20&limit=20
```

All listing endpoints support offset pagination.

# Filtering

All listing endpoints support filtering using the `filter` query parameter, following 1EdTech's filtering specification.

The filter should be a string with the following format:

```css
?filter=[field][operator][value]
```

Example request:

```bash
GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users?filter=status='active'
```

Example request with multiple filters:

```bash
GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users?filter=status='active' AND name='John'
```

**Filtering by nested relations is not supported**.

# Sorting

All listing endpoints support sorting using the `sort` and `orderBy` query parameters, following 1EdTech's sorting specification

Example request:

```bash
GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users?sort=lastName&orderBy=asc
```

# Proprietary Extensions

This implementation includes proprietary extensions that extend beyond the official OneRoster 1.2 specification to provide additional functionality.

## Search Parameter

In addition to the standard `filter` parameter, this implementation provides a `search` query parameter for simplified free-text searching:

```bash
GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users?search=john
```

**Purpose**: The `search` parameter enables convenient text-based queries across multiple fields simultaneously, whereas the standard `filter` parameter requires specifying exact field names and operators:

```sql
# Search parameter - searches across multiple fields automatically
GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users?search=john

# Equivalent using standard filter parameter
GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users?filter=givenName~'john' OR familyName~'john'
```

The `search` parameter performs case-insensitive partial matching across predefined fields for each endpoint, providing a more user-friendly querying experience.

## OneRoster 1.2 Standard Parameters

The official OneRoster 1.2 specification defines these standard parameters:

- `limit` - pagination limit
- `offset` - pagination offset
- `sort` - field to sort by
- `orderBy` - sort direction (asc/desc)
- `filter` - filtering expression
- `fields` - field selection

## Affected Endpoints

The proprietary `search` parameter is available on the following endpoints:

**Rostering API**:

- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/academicSessions/`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/classes/`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/classes/{classSourcedId}/students`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/classes/{classSourcedId}/teachers`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/courses/`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/courses/{courseSourcedId}/classes`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/demographics/`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/enrollments/`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/schools/{schoolSourcedId}/classes/{classSourcedId}/students`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/users/`

**Gradebook API**:

- `GET /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/assessmentLineItems/`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/assessmentResults/`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{classSourcedId}/students/{studentSourcedId}/results`
- `GET /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/results/`

**Resources API**:

- `GET /ims/oneroster/resources/v1p2/resources/`

## Parameter Usage Guide

### Filter Parameter

The standard `filter` parameter provides precise control over queries using these operators:

- `=` - Exact match
- `!=` - Not equal
- `~` - Contains (case-insensitive)
- `>`, `>=`, `<`, `<=` - Comparison operators
- `@` - In list (comma-separated values)

### Logical Operators

Combine multiple conditions in filter expressions:

- `AND` - Both conditions must be true
- `OR` - Either condition must be true

### Usage Examples

```bash
# Simple text search across multiple fields
GET /users?search=john

# Equivalent precise filtering
GET /users?filter=givenName~'john' OR familyName~'john'

# Complex filtering with multiple conditions
GET /users?filter=status='active' AND givenName~'john'

# Advanced filtering with different operators
GET /users?filter=dateLastModified>'2023-01-01' AND status='active'
```

## Search Fields by Endpoint

Different endpoints search across these predefined fields:

- **Users**: `givenName`, `familyName`, `email`
- **Courses**: `title`, `courseCode`
- **Classes**: `title`
- **Organizations**: `name`

## Interoperability Notes

The `search` parameter is a proprietary extension specific to this implementation. Other OneRoster-compliant systems may only support the standard `filter` parameter. When building applications that need to work with multiple OneRoster providers, consider using the standard filtering approach.

## Additional Schema Fields

### AssessmentLineItem Extensions

The AssessmentLineItem schema includes two proprietary fields that extend curriculum mapping capabilities:

#### Component Field

- **Field**: `component`
- **Type**: Object reference (`{ sourcedId: string }`)
- **Purpose**: Direct association between assessment line items and course components, enabling enhanced curriculum mapping and learning pathway tracking.

#### ComponentResource Field

- **Field**: `componentResource`
- **Type**: Object reference (`{ sourcedId: string }`)
- **Purpose**: Direct association between assessment line items and specific learning resources, supporting detailed content-to-assessment relationships and adaptive learning features.

**Example Usage**:

```json
{
  "sourcedId": "assessment-123",
  "title": "Chapter 5 Quiz",
  "component": { "sourcedId": "component-456" },
  "componentResource": { "sourcedId": "resource-789" }
}
```

## Affected Endpoints

### Schema Extensions Availability

The proprietary schema fields are available in:

**Gradebook API**:

- `GET /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/assessmentLineItems/` - Returns assessmentLineItems with `component` and `componentResource` fields
- `GET /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/assessmentLineItems/{sourcedId}` - Returns individual assessmentLineItem with extended fields
- `POST /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/assessmentLineItems/` - Accepts `component` and `componentResource` in request body
- `PUT /ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/assessmentLineItems/{sourcedId}` - Accepts extended fields for updates

## Servers

- **URL:** `https://api.alpha-1edtech.com`
  - **Description:** OneRoster API

### Get all Score Scales

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/scoreScales/`
- **Tags:** Score Scales Management

### Create a Score Scale

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/scoreScales/`
- **Tags:** Score Scales Management

To create a new scoreScale. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created scoreScale records.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`scoreScale` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a score scale.

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreScaleValue` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`itemValueLHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`itemValueRHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`description`**

      `string`

    - **`value`**

      `string`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`course`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "scoreScale": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "title": "",
    "type": "",
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "course": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScaleValue": [
      {
        "itemValueLHS": "",
        "itemValueRHS": "",
        "value": "",
        "description": ""
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Score scale successfully created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

### Get a Score Scale

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/scoreScales/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Score Scales Management

Get a specific scoreScale on the service provider.

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response with the score scale

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`scoreScale` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a score scale.

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreScaleValue` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`itemValueLHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`itemValueRHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`description`**

      `string`

    - **`value`**

      `string`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`course`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

### Update or Create a Score Scale

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/scoreScales/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Score Scales Management

To update an existing scoreScale or create a new one if it doesn't exist. The sourcedId for the record is supplied by the requesting system.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`scoreScale` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a score scale.

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreScaleValue` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`itemValueLHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`itemValueRHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`description`**

      `string`

    - **`value`**

      `string`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`course`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "scoreScale": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "title": "",
    "type": "",
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "course": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScaleValue": [
      {
        "itemValueLHS": "",
        "itemValueRHS": "",
        "value": "",
        "description": ""
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

### Delete a Score Scale

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/scoreScales/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Score Scales Management

Perform a soft delete on a specific Score Scale on the service provider. This operation changes the status of the Score Scale to 'tobedeleted'.

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Score scale successfully deleted

### Get Score Scales for a School

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/schools/{sourcedId}/scoreScales`
- **Tags:** Schools Management, Score Scales Management

Get the set of scoreScales on the service provider for a specific school. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'School not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of score scales

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`scoreScales` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreScaleValue` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`itemValueLHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`itemValueRHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`description`**

      `string`

    - **`value`**

      `string`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`course`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "scoreScales": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "title": "",
      "type": "",
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "course": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScaleValue": [
        {
          "itemValueLHS": "",
          "itemValueRHS": "",
          "value": "",
          "description": ""
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

### Get all Schools

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/schools/`
- **Tags:** Schools Management

To get all Schools on the service provider.

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Collection of schools successfully retrieved

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`orgs` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`children` (required)**

    `array | null`, default: `[]`

  - **`identifier` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`name` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`sourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"department", "school", "district", "local", "state", "national"`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object | null`

  - **`parent`**

    `object | null`

    - **`href` (required)**

      `string`, format: `uri`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`type` (required)**

      `string`

  `number`

      "identifier": "",
      "parent": {

        "sourcedId": "",
        "type": ""
      },
      "children": []
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

### Create a new School

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/schools/`
- **Tags:** Schools Management

To create a new School. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created school record.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`org` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`name` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`identifier`**

    `string | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object | null`

  - **`parent`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "org": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "metadata": null,
    "name": "",
    "type": "school",
    "identifier": null,
    "parent": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    }
  }
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 School successfully created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

### Get a specific School

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/schools/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Schools Management

Get a specific School on the service provider. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'School not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 School successfully retrieved

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`org` (required)**

  `object` — Represents an organization.

  - **`children` (required)**

    `array | null`, default: `[]`

  - **`identifier` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`name` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`sourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"department", "school", "district", "local", "state", "national"`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object | null`

  - **`parent`**

    `object | null`

    - **`href` (required)**

      `string`, format: `uri`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`type` (required)**

      `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "org": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": null,
    "name": "",
    "type": "department",
    "identifier": "",
    "parent": {
      "href": "",
      "sourcedId": "",
      "type": ""
    },
    "children": []
  }
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`imsx_codeMajor` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

### Update a School

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/schools/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Schools Management

To update an existing School. The sourcedId for the record to be updated is supplied by the requesting system.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`org` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`name` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`identifier`**

    `string | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object | null`

  - **`parent`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "org": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "metadata": null,
    "name": "",
    "type": "school",
    "identifier": null,
    "parent": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    }
  }
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 School successfully updated

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`children` (required)**

  `array | null`, default: `[]`

- **`identifier` (required)**

  `string`

- **`name` (required)**

  `string`

- **`sourcedId` (required)**

  `string`

- **`status` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

- **`type` (required)**

  `string`, possible values: `"department", "school", "district", "local", "state", "national"`

- **`dateLastModified`**

  `string`, format: `date-time`

- **`metadata`**

  `object | null`

- **`parent`**

  `object | null`

  - **`href` (required)**

    `string`, format: `uri`

  - **`sourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedId": "",
  "status": "active",
  "dateLastModified": "",
  "metadata": null,
  "name": "",
  "type": "department",
  "identifier": "",
  "parent": {
    "href": "",
    "sourcedId": "",
    "type": ""
  },
  "children": []
}
```

### Delete a School

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/rostering/v1p2/schools/{sourcedId}`

### Get all Results

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/results/`
- **Tags:** Results Management

Get all of the results on the service provider.

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of results

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`results` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "results": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "lineItem": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "student": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreStatus": "exempt",
      "score": null,
      "textScore": null,
      "scoreDate": "",
      "comment": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveResults": [
            {
              "learningObjectiveId": "",
              "score": 1,
              "textScore": ""
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "inProgress": "",
      "incomplete": "",
      "late": "",
      "missing": ""
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

### Create a Result

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/results/`
- **Tags:** Results Management

To create a new result. The request body must include a `result` object with the following required fields: `lineItem` (with sourcedId), `student` (with sourcedId), `scoreStatus`, and `scoreDate`. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created result records.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`result` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a result.

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

**Example:**

```
{
  "result": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "lineItem": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "student": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScale": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreStatus": "exempt",
    "score": null,
    "textScore": null,
    "scoreDate": "",
    "comment": null,
    "learningObjectiveSet": [
      {
        "source": "",
        "learningObjectiveResults": [
          {
            "learningObjectiveId": "",
            "score": 1,
            "textScore": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "inProgress": "",
    "incomplete": "",
    "late": "",
    "missing": ""
  }
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Result successfully created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

    `array`

    **Items:**

      `string`, default: `"TargetEndSystem"` — The field name for the minor code

### Get a Result

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/results/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Results Management

Get a specific result on the service provider. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Result not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response with the result

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`result` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a result.

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

### Update or Create a Result

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/results/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Results Management

To update an existing result or create a new one if it doesn't exist. The sourcedId for the record is supplied by the requesting system.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`result` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a result.

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

**Example:**

```
{
  "result": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "lineItem": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "student": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScale": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreStatus": "exempt",
    "score": null,
    "textScore": null,
    "scoreDate": "",
    "comment": null,
    "learningObjectiveSet": [
      {
        "source": "",
        "learningObjectiveResults": [
          {
            "learningObjectiveId": "",
            "score": 1,
            "textScore": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "inProgress": "",
    "incomplete": "",
    "late": "",
    "missing": ""
  }
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Result successfully created or updated

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`result` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a result.

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

**Example:**

```
{
  "result": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "lineItem": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "student": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScale": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreStatus": "exempt",
    "score": null,
    "textScore": null,
    "scoreDate": "",
    "comment": null,
    "learningObjectiveSet": [
      {
        "source": "",
        "learningObjectiveResults": [
          {
            "learningObjectiveId": "",
            "score": 1,
            "textScore": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "inProgress": "",
    "incomplete": "",
    "late": "",
    "missing": ""
  }
}

### Delete a Result

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/results/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Results Management

Perform a soft delete on a specific Result on the service provider. This operation changes the status of the Result to 'tobedeleted'.

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Result successfully deleted

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`imsx_codeMajor` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

- **`imsx_CodeMinor` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`imsx_codeMinorField` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

### Get all Line Items

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/lineItems/`
- **Tags:** Line Items Management

Get all of the Line Items on the service provider.

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of line items

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`lineItems` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItems": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "title": "",
      "description": null,
      "assignDate": "",
      "dueDate": "",
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "school": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "category": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "gradingPeriod": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "academicSession": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "resultValueMin": null,
      "resultValueMax": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveIds": [
            ""
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

### Create a Line Item

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/lineItems/`
- **Tags:** Line Items Management

To create a new Line Item. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created Line Item records.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`lineItem` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a line item.

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItem": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "title": "",
    "description": null,
    "assignDate": "",
    "dueDate": "",
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "school": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "category": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "gradingPeriod": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "academicSession": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScale": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "resultValueMin": null,
    "resultValueMax": null,
    "learningObjectiveSet": [
      {
        "source": "",
        "learningObjectiveIds": [
          ""
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Line item successfully created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`imsx_codeMajor` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

- **`imsx_CodeMinor` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`imsx_codeMinorField` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldName` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"TargetEndSystem"` — The field name for the minor code

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldValue` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"invaliddata"` — The field value for the minor code

- **`imsx_description` (required)**

  `string`

- **`imsx_severity` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"error"` — The severity of the response

- **`imsx_error_details`**

  `array`

  **Items:**

**Example:**

```
{
  "imsx_codeMajor": "failure",
  "imsx_severity": "error",
  "imsx_description": "",
  "imsx_CodeMinor": {
    "imsx_codeMinorField": [
      {

### Get a Line Item

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/lineItems/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Line Items Management

Get a specific Line Item on the service provider. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Line item not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response with the line item

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`lineItem` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a line item.

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItem": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "title": "",
    "description": null,
    "assignDate": "",
    "dueDate": "",
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "school": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "category": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "gradingPeriod": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "academicSession": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScale": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "resultValueMin": null,
    "resultValueMax": null,
    "learningObjectiveSet": [
      {
        "source": "",
        "learningObjectiveIds": [
          ""
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

- **`imsx_CodeMinor` (required)**

  - **`imsx_codeMinorField` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldName` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"TargetEndSystem"` — The field name for the minor code

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldValue` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"invaliddata"` — The field value for the minor code

- **`imsx_description` (required)**

  `string`

- **`imsx_severity` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"error"` — The severity of the response

- **`imsx_error_details`**

  `array`

  **Items:**

**Example:**

### Update or Create a Line Item

- **Method:** `PUT`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/lineItems/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Line Items Management

To update an existing Line Item or create a new one if it doesn't exist. The sourcedId for the record is supplied by the requesting system.

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`lineItem` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a line item.

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItem": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "title": "",
    "description": null,
    "assignDate": "",
    "dueDate": "",
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "school": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "category": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "gradingPeriod": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "academicSession": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScale": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "resultValueMin": null,
    "resultValueMax": null,
    "learningObjectiveSet": [
      {
        "source": "",
        "learningObjectiveIds": [
          ""
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Line item successfully created or updated

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`lineItem` (required)**

  `object` — Represents a line item.

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItem": {
    "sourcedId": "",
    "status": "active",
    "dateLastModified": "",
    "metadata": {
      "propertyName*": "anything"
    },
    "title": "",
    "description": null,
    "assignDate": "",
    "dueDate": "",
    "class": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "school": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "category": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "gradingPeriod": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "academicSession": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "scoreScale": {
      "sourcedId": ""
    },
    "resultValueMin": null,
    "resultValueMax": null,
    "learningObjectiveSet": [

        "source": "",
        "learningObjectiveIds": [

### Delete a Line Item

- **Method:** `DELETE`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/lineItems/{sourcedId}`
- **Tags:** Line Items Management

Perform a soft delete on a specific Line Item on the service provider. This operation changes the status of the Line Item to 'tobedeleted'.

#### Responses

##### Status: 204 Line item successfully deleted

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

### Create a Result for a Line Item

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/lineItems/{sourcedId}/results`
- **Tags:** Line Items Management

To create a new result for a specific Line Item. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created result records. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Line item not found.'

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`results` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

**Example:**

```
{
  "results": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "lineItem": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "student": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreStatus": "exempt",
      "score": null,
      "textScore": null,
      "scoreDate": "",
      "comment": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveResults": [
            {
              "learningObjectiveId": "",
              "score": 1,
              "textScore": ""
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "inProgress": "",
      "incomplete": "",
      "late": "",
      "missing": ""
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Result successfully created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`imsx_codeMajor` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

- **`imsx_CodeMinor` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`imsx_codeMinorField` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldName` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"TargetEndSystem"` — The field name for the minor code

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldValue` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"invaliddata"` — The field value for the minor code

- **`imsx_description` (required)**

  `string`

- **`imsx_severity` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"error"` — The severity of the response

- **`imsx_error_details`**

  `array`

  **Items:**

**Example:**

  "imsx_codeMajor": "failure",
  "imsx_severity": "error",
  "imsx_description": "",
  "imsx_CodeMinor": {
    "imsx_codeMinorField": [
      {
        "imsx_codeMinorFieldName": "TargetEndSystem",
        "imsx_codeMinorFieldValue": "invaliddata"
      }
    ]
  },
  "imsx_error_details": [
    {
      "propertyName*": ""
    }
  ]
}
```

### Get Line Items for a School

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/schools/{sourcedId}/lineItems`
- **Tags:** Schools Management, Line Items Management

Get the set of lineItems on the service provider for a specific school. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'School not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of line items

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`lineItems` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItems": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "title": "",
      "description": null,
      "assignDate": "",
      "dueDate": "",
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "school": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "category": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "gradingPeriod": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "academicSession": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "resultValueMin": null,
      "resultValueMax": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveIds": [
            ""
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

### Create Line Items for a School

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/schools/{sourcedId}/lineItems`
- **Tags:** Schools Management, Line Items Management

To create a set of lineItems for a specific school. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created lineItem records. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'School not found.'

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`lineItems` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItems": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "title": "",
      "description": null,
      "assignDate": "",
      "dueDate": "",
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "school": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "category": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "gradingPeriod": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "academicSession": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "resultValueMin": null,
      "resultValueMax": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveIds": [
            ""
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Line items successfully created for school

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

###### Content-Type: application/json

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

### Create Results for an Academic Session for a Class

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{classSourcedId}/academicSessions/{academicSessionSourcedId}/results`
- **Tags:** Classes Management

To create a set of results for a specific academic session and specific class. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created result records. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Class or academic session not found.'

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`results` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

**Example:**

```
{
  "results": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "lineItem": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "student": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreStatus": "exempt",
      "score": null,
      "textScore": null,
      "scoreDate": "",
      "comment": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveResults": [
            {
              "learningObjectiveId": "",
              "score": 1,
              "textScore": ""
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "inProgress": "",
      "incomplete": "",
      "late": "",
      "missing": ""
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Results successfully created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`imsx_codeMajor` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

- **`imsx_CodeMinor` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`imsx_codeMinorField` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldName` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"TargetEndSystem"` — The field name for the minor code

    - **`imsx_codeMinorFieldValue` (required)**

      `string`, default: `"invaliddata"` — The field value for the minor code

- **`imsx_description` (required)**

  `string`

- **`imsx_severity` (required)**

  `string`, default: `"error"` — The severity of the response

- **`imsx_error_details`**

  `array`

  **Items:**

**Example:**

  "imsx_severity": "error",
  "imsx_description": "",
  "imsx_CodeMinor": {

      {

        "imsx_codeMinorFieldValue": "invaliddata"
      }
    ]
  },
  "imsx_error_details": [

      "propertyName*": ""
    }
  ]
}

### Create Line Items for a Class

- **Method:** `POST`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{classSourcedId}/lineItems`
- **Tags:** Classes Management

To create a set of lineItems for a specific class. The responding system must return the set of sourcedIds that have been allocated to the newly created lineItem records. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Class not found.'

#### Request Body

##### Content-Type: application/json

- **`lineItems` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItems": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "title": "",
      "description": null,
      "assignDate": "",
      "dueDate": "",
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "school": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "category": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "gradingPeriod": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "academicSession": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "resultValueMin": null,
      "resultValueMax": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveIds": [
            ""
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

#### Responses

##### Status: 201 Line item successfully created

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`sourcedIdPairs` (required)**

  `object`

  - **`allocatedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`suppliedSourcedId` (required)**

    `string`

**Example:**

```
{
  "sourcedIdPairs": {
    "suppliedSourcedId": "",
    "allocatedSourcedId": ""
  }
}
```

### Get Results for a Line Item for a Class

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{classSourcedId}/lineItems/{lineItemSourcedId}/results`
- **Tags:** Classes Management

Get the set of results on the service provider for a specific lineItem and for a specific class. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Class or line item not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of results for the specified line item in the class

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`results` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "results": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "lineItem": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "student": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreStatus": "exempt",
      "score": null,
      "textScore": null,
      "scoreDate": "",
      "comment": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveResults": [
            {
              "learningObjectiveId": "",
              "score": 1,
              "textScore": ""
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "inProgress": "",
      "incomplete": "",
      "late": "",
      "missing": ""
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

### Get Categories for a Class

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{sourcedId}/categories`
- **Tags:** Classes Management

Get the set of categories on the service provider for a specific class. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Class not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of categories for the class

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`categories` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`weight`**

    `number | null`

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "categories": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "title": "",
      "weight": null
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

### Get Line Items for a Class

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{sourcedId}/lineItems`
- **Tags:** Classes Management

Get the set of lineItems on the service provider for a specific class. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Class not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of line items for the class

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`lineItems` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`assignDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`category` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dueDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`school` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`academicSession`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`description`**

    `string | null`

  - **`gradingPeriod`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`resultValueMax`**

    `number | null`

  - **`resultValueMin`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`status`**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`, default: `"active"`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "lineItems": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "title": "",
      "description": null,
      "assignDate": "",
      "dueDate": "",
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "school": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "category": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "gradingPeriod": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "academicSession": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "resultValueMin": null,
      "resultValueMax": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveIds": [
            ""
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

### Get Results for a Class

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{sourcedId}/results`
- **Tags:** Classes Management

Get the set of results on the service provider for a specific class. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Class not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of results for the class

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`results` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`lineItem` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreDate` (required)**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`scoreStatus` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"exempt", "fully graded", "not submitted", "partially graded", "submitted"`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`student` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`class`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`comment`**

    `string | null`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`incomplete`**

    `string`

  - **`inProgress`**

    `string`

  - **`late`**

    `string`

  - **`learningObjectiveSet`**

    `array | null`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`missing`**

    `string`

  - **`score`**

    `number | null`

  - **`scoreScale`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

  - **`textScore`**

    `string | null`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "results": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },
      "lineItem": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "student": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "class": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreScale": {
        "sourcedId": ""
      },
      "scoreStatus": "exempt",
      "score": null,
      "textScore": null,
      "scoreDate": "",
      "comment": null,
      "learningObjectiveSet": [
        {
          "source": "",
          "learningObjectiveResults": [
            {
              "learningObjectiveId": "",
              "score": 1,
              "textScore": ""
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "inProgress": "",
      "incomplete": "",
      "late": "",
      "missing": ""
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 1,
  "pageCount": 1,
  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
}
```

##### Status: 400 Bad Request

###### Content-Type: application/json

  `string`, default: `"failure"` — The major response code

  `object`

    `array`

      `string`, default: `"TargetEndSystem"` — The field name for the minor code

### Get Score Scales for a Class

- **Method:** `GET`
- **Path:** `/ims/oneroster/gradebook/v1p2/classes/{sourcedId}/scoreScales`
- **Tags:** Classes Management

Get the set of scoreScales on the service provider for a specific class. If the corresponding record cannot be located, the api will return a 404 error code and message 'Class not found.'

#### Responses

##### Status: 200 Successful response containing a collection of score scales for the class

###### Content-Type: application/json

- **`limit` (required)**

  `number`

- **`offset` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageCount` (required)**

  `number`

- **`pageNumber` (required)**

  `number`

- **`scoreScales` (required)**

  `array`

  **Items:**

  - **`class` (required)**

    `object`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`scoreScaleValue` (required)**

    `array`

    **Items:**

    - **`itemValueLHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`itemValueRHS` (required)**

      `string`

    - **`description`**

      `string`

    - **`value`**

      `string`

  - **`status` (required)**

    `string`, possible values: `"active", "tobedeleted"`

  - **`title` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`type` (required)**

    `string`

  - **`course`**

    `object | null`

    - **`sourcedId` (required)**

      `string`

  - **`dateLastModified`**

    `string`, format: `date-time`

  - **`metadata`**

    `object` — Additional metadata for the object

  - **`sourcedId`**

    `string`

- **`totalCount` (required)**

  `number`

**Example:**

```
{
  "scoreScales": [
    {
      "sourcedId": "",
      "status": "active",
      "dateLastModified": "",
      "metadata": {
        "propertyName*": "anything"
      },

      "type": "",

        "sourcedId": ""

  "pageNumber": 1,
  "offset": 1,
  "limit": 1
